name: Permanent Limits Post-Forklift Shoulder Centerville

mainEntity.name: Permanent restrictions after forklift shoulder tear in Centerville UT?
mainEntity.text: Permanent restrictions after forklift shoulder tear in Centerville UT?

acceptedAnswer.text: Doc assigns via impairment rating; light duty if <50lbs lift. Comp pays if no employer accommodations.

suggestedAnswer.text: Centerville light industrial shifts resist mods. FCE tests validate; transition to partial disability.
